requirement_topic.en: Lithium-Ion Cell and Battery Safety for Industrial Applications
requirement_topic.zh: 工业应用锂离子电芯与电池安全
requirement_topic.zht: 工業應用鋰離子電芯與電池安全

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 sets safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, including BESS. It covers abuse testing (overcharge, over-discharge, short-circuit, thermal, crush), BMS requirements, and marking. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU requires harmonised standard compliance; EN IEC 62619 is listed in the LVD Official Journal as a harmonised standard. EN IEC 63056 covers secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems. In Hungary, MSZT is the national standards body that adopts and publishes European standards as MSZ EN standards.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022 规定了工业应用（含BESS）二次锂电芯与电池组的安全要求，涵盖滥用测试（过充、过放、短路、热冲击、挤压）、电池管理系统要求及标识。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU获取CE标志须符合相应协调标准；EN IEC 62619已列入低电压指令官方公报协调标准清单。EN IEC 63056规定用于电气储能系统的二次锂电芯与电池安全要求。在匈牙利，MSZT作为国家标准化机构，以MSZ EN标准形式采用并发布欧洲标准。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022 規定工業應用（含BESS）二次鋰電芯與電池組的安全要求，涵蓋濫用測試（過充、過放、短路、熱衝擊、擠壓）、電池管理系統要求及標識。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌須符合相應協調標準；EN IEC 62619已列入低電壓指令官方公報協調標準清單。EN IEC 63056規定用於電氣儲能系統的二次鋰電芯與電池安全要求。在匈牙利，MSZT作為國家標準化機構，以MSZ EN標準形式採用並發布歐洲標準。

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (Electric Energy Storage Lithium-Ion Batteries) is a recommended Chinese national standard for lithium-ion batteries used in power energy storage systems. It specifies safety performance requirements including electrical, mechanical, environmental, and abuse tests for cells and battery packs, but its GB/T status means it is not itself the compulsory national requirement. China's compulsory cell and battery safety standard for electric energy storage is GB 44240-2024. Testing expectations may still reference GB/T 36276 in projects or procurement, but mandatory-status conclusions should be based on GB 44240-2024 and the applicable regulator or grid-operator requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）是中国推荐性国家标准，适用于电力储能系统用锂离子电池，规定电芯及电池组的安全性能要求，包括电气、机械、环境及滥用测试；但其GB/T属性意味着该标准本身并非强制性国家要求。中国针对电力储能用电芯及电池安全的强制性标准为GB 44240-2024。项目或采购要求仍可能引用GB/T 36276，但判断强制属性时应以GB 44240-2024及适用监管机构或电网企业要求为依据。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）是中國推薦性國家標準，適用於電力儲能系統用鋰離子電池，規定電芯及電池組的安全性能要求，包括電氣、機械、環境及濫用測試；但其GB/T屬性意味著該標準本身並非強制性國家要求。中國針對電力儲能用電芯及電池安全的強制性標準為GB 44240-2024。項目或採購要求仍可能引用GB/T 36276，但判斷強制屬性時應以GB 44240-2024及適用監管機構或電網企業要求為依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — recommended national standard for electric energy storage lithium-ion batteries
GB 44240-2024 — compulsory safety requirement for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 36276 / GB 44240 test protocols and pass/fail criteria differ from EN IEC 62619 in several areas: nail penetration test conditions, thermal runaway propagation testing (required by EN IEC 62619 Annex C, not directly equivalent), and BMS functional safety depth. EU importers require a Declaration of Conformity and technical file under LVD; Chinese test reports or certificates are not recognised by EU notified bodies as substitutes. Manufacturers must re-test to EN IEC 62619 / EN IEC 63056 at an EU-recognised lab and issue EU DoC. Hungary's strong CATL and BYD manufacturing presence means local MSZT-adopted standards awareness is high, but Chinese domestic test reports still require EU-format supplementation.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 36276/GB 44240与EN IEC 62619在多项测试协议和判定准则上存在差异：针刺测试条件、热失控蔓延测试（EN IEC 62619附录C要求，未形成直接等同关系）、电池管理系统功能安全深度。欧盟进口商依据低电压指令须提供符合性声明及技术文件；中国检测报告或证书不被欧盟通知机构认可为替代依据。制造商须在欧盟认可实验室重新按EN IEC 62619/EN IEC 63056测试，并出具欧盟符合性声明。匈牙利拥有宁德时代和比亚迪制造基地，当地对MSZT采用标准的了解程度较高，但中国国内测试报告仍须以欧盟格式补充。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 36276/GB 44240與EN IEC 62619在多項測試協議和判定準則上存在差異：針刺測試條件、熱失控蔓延測試（EN IEC 62619附錄C要求，未形成直接等同關係）、電池管理系統功能安全深度。歐盟進口商依據低電壓指令須提供符合性聲明及技術文件；中國檢測報告或證書不被歐盟公告機構認可為替代依據。製造商須在歐盟認可實驗室重新按EN IEC 62619/EN IEC 63056測試，並出具歐盟符合性聲明。匈牙利擁有寧德時代和比亞迪製造基地，當地對MSZT採用標準的了解程度較高，但中國國內測試報告仍須以歐盟格式補充。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for market access in EU/Hungary; MSZT adopts EU harmonised standards as MSZ EN standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is the compulsory national cell/battery safety requirement; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended (GB/T) and may be referenced by projects or procurement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 or GB 44240-2024 evidence does not satisfy EU/Hungary LVD requirements. Separate EN IEC 62619:2022 and/or EN IEC 63056:2020 testing at an EU-recognised laboratory and issuance of an EU Declaration of Conformity are required before placing BESS on the Hungarian/EU market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024证据不满足欧盟/匈牙利低电压指令要求。在欧盟认可实验室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020测试，并出具欧盟符合性声明，方可在匈牙利/欧盟市场销售BESS产品。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024證據不滿足歐盟/匈牙利低電壓指令要求。在歐盟認可實驗室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020測試，並出具歐盟符合性聲明，方可在匈牙利/歐盟市場銷售BESS產品。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Safety — System Level
requirement_topic.zh: 电池储能系统（BESS）整机安全
requirement_topic.zht: 電池儲能系統（BESS）整機安全

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems) defines system-level safety requirements for BESS connected to the grid, including hazard identification, risk assessment, thermal runaway propagation prevention, fire suppression, and installation safety. Ed 2.0 remains in development and does not supersede the 2020 edition for this dataset. Under EU law, compliance with the essential safety requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is mandatory; harmonised standards such as IEC/EN 62933-5-2 are voluntary and provide a presumption of conformity only when their references are published in the EU Official Journal (OJ). The EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 additionally imposes lifecycle, due-diligence, and carbon-footprint requirements on industrial batteries. In Hungary, system-level BESS installations also require MEKH energy-sector licensing for facilities above regulatory thresholds.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（电气储能系统——并网电气储能系统安全要求）规定BESS系统级安全要求，涵盖危害识别、风险评估、热失控蔓延防护、消防及安装安全。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本数据集中不视为取代2020年版。依据欧盟法律，遵守低电压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求属强制义务；IEC/EN 62933-5-2等协调标准属自愿采用，仅在其参考编号发布于欧盟官方公报（OJ）时，方可推定符合强制要求。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542另对工业电池提出全生命周期、尽职调查及碳足迹要求。在匈牙利，超过监管阈值的系统级BESS安装还须取得MEKH能源行业许可。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（電氣儲能系統——並網電氣儲能系統安全要求）規定BESS系統級安全要求，涵蓋危害識別、風險評估、熱失控蔓延防護、消防及安裝安全。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本數據集中不視為取代2020年版。依據歐盟法律，遵守低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求屬強制義務；IEC/EN 62933-5-2等協調標準屬自願採用，僅在其參考編號發布於歐盟官方公報（OJ）時，方可推定符合強制要求。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542另對工業電池提出全生命週期、盡職調查及碳足跡要求。在匈牙利，超過監管閾值的系統級BESS安裝還須取得MEKH能源行業許可。

standards_or_laws: MEKH (Hungarian Energy and Public Utility Regulatory Authority) energy-sector licensing requirements

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electric Energy Storage Systems Connected to Power Systems) specifies system-level technical and safety requirements for grid-connected BESS in China, including electrical performance, protection, communication, and safety functions. It is a recommended (non-mandatory) national standard but is referenced in grid-connection agreements with State Grid and China Southern Power Grid, making it effectively mandatory for grid-connected projects. As of mid-2026, no Chinese national standard contains thermal runaway propagation prevention test requirements directly equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 Annex B; this gap is a recognised regulatory difference between the Chinese and EU frameworks.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）规定中国并网储能系统的系统级技术与安全要求，包括电气性能、保护、通信及安全功能。该标准为推荐性国家标准，但在国家电网和南方电网的并网协议中被引用，使其对并网项目实际上具有强制效力。截至2026年中，中国国家标准中尚无与IEC 62933-5-2附录B直接对应的热失控蔓延防护测试要求；这一差距是中欧监管框架之间已获认可的差异。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）規定中國並網儲能系統的系統級技術與安全要求，包括電氣性能、保護、通信及安全功能。該標準為推薦性國家標準，但在國家電網和南方電網的並網協議中被引用，使其對並網項目實際上具有強制效力。截至2026年中，中國國家標準中尚無與IEC 62933-5-2附錄B直接對應的熱失控蔓延防護測試要求；這一差距是中歐監管框架之間已獲認可的差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage (supersedes GB/T 34131-2017; published and in force October 2023; recommended national standard covering BMS requirements for lithium-ion, sodium-ion, lead-acid, flow, and hydrogen fuel-cell based storage)

gap.en: IEC 62933-5-2 thermal runaway propagation prevention requirements (Annex B) and fire-suppression system mandates have no direct equivalent in Chinese national standards as of mid-2026. EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposes due-diligence, carbon footprint declaration, and battery passport requirements not present in Chinese regulation. Chinese exporters must conduct system-level risk assessment per IEC 62933-5-2 and obtain EU DoC; GB/T 36558 compliance reports are not accepted as EU/Hungary market-access evidence. MEKH licensing for large BESS facilities in Hungary requires Hungarian-language technical submissions.
gap.zh: IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延防护要求（附录B）及消防系统强制规定在截至2026年中的中国国家标准中无直接对应。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542对尽职调查、碳足迹声明及电池护照的要求在中国法规中亦无对应。中国出口商须按IEC 62933-5-2进行系统级风险评估并取得欧盟符合性声明；GB/T 36558合规报告不被接受为欧盟/匈牙利市场准入证明。匈牙利大型BESS设施的MEKH许可申请须以匈牙利语提交技术文件。
gap.zht: IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延防護要求（附錄B）及消防系統強制規定在截至2026年中的中國國家標準中無直接對應。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542對盡職調查、碳足跡聲明及電池護照的要求在中國法規中亦無對應。中國出口商須按IEC 62933-5-2進行系統級風險評估並取得歐盟符合性聲明；GB/T 36558合規報告不被接受為歐盟/匈牙利市場准入證明。匈牙利大型BESS設施的MEKH許可申請須以匈牙利語提交技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the essential requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is legally required for EU/Hungary market access; MEKH licensing is required for BESS facilities above regulatory capacity thresholds in Hungary
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) but effectively mandatory for grid-connection approval by State Grid / China Southern Power Grid

source.publisher: Hungarian Energy and Public Utility Regulatory Authority (MEKH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 compliance does not satisfy EU/Hungary requirements. EU market access requires CE marking and satisfaction of the essential safety requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. IEC/EN 62933-5-2 may be used to support system-level conformity if its reference is OJ-listed or as technical evidence where it is not; in either case, it is a tool for demonstrating conformity with the mandatory EU legislative requirements — not itself a mandatory obligation. EU Declaration of Conformity, technical file, and battery passport (from 18 February 2027) are all required. MEKH licensing submissions must be in Hungarian.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558合规不满足欧盟/匈牙利要求。进入欧盟/匈牙利市场须取得CE标志，并满足低电压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求。IEC/EN 62933-5-2可在其参考编号列入官方公报时或未列入时（作为技术证据）用于支持系统级符合性评估；无论哪种情形，该标准均为证明符合欧盟强制性法律要求的工具，其本身并非强制性义务。欧盟符合性声明、技术文件及电池护照（自2027年2月18日起）均为必须。MEKH许可申请须以匈牙利语提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558合規不滿足歐盟/匈牙利要求。進入歐盟/匈牙利市場須取得CE標誌，並滿足低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求。IEC/EN 62933-5-2可在其參考編號列入官方公報時或未列入時（作為技術證據）用於支持系統級符合性評估；無論哪種情形，該標準均為證明符合歐盟強制性法律要求的工具，其本身並非強制性義務。歐盟符合性聲明、技術文件及電池護照（自2027年2月18日起）均為必須。MEKH許可申請須以匈牙利語提交。

requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Directive — Electrical Safety for BESS Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 低电压指令——BESS设备电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: 低電壓指令——BESS設備電氣安全

summary.en: LVD 2014/35/EU requires all electrical equipment operating between 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC placed on the EU market to be safe and CE marked. For BESS, this covers the battery system, inverter/PCS, switchgear, and enclosures. The manufacturer must prepare a technical file, conduct conformity assessment (typically internal production control for harmonised-standard-covered products), and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity. Harmonised standards EN IEC 62619, EN IEC 63056, and IEC 62933-5-2 provide presumption of conformity with LVD essential safety requirements. In Hungary, MSZT adopts EU harmonised standards as MSZ EN standards, and market surveillance is conducted by the Hungarian Trade Licensing Office (MKEH) and relevant sectoral authorities.
summary.zh: 低电压指令2014/35/EU要求在欧盟市场销售的所有工作电压在50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC范围内的电气设备须安全并加贴CE标志。对于BESS，该指令适用于电池系统、逆变器/PCS、开关设备及外壳。制造商须准备技术文件，进行符合性评估（协调标准覆盖产品通常为内部生产控制），并出具欧盟符合性声明。EN IEC 62619、EN IEC 63056及IEC 62933-5-2协调标准可推定符合低电压指令基本安全要求。在匈牙利，MSZT以MSZ EN标准形式采用欧盟协调标准，市场监管由匈牙利贸易许可局（MKEH）及相关行业主管机构负责。
summary.zht: 低電壓指令2014/35/EU要求在歐盟市場銷售的所有工作電壓在50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC範圍內的電氣設備須安全並加貼CE標誌。對於BESS，該指令適用於電池系統、逆變器/PCS、開關設備及外殼。製造商須準備技術文件，進行符合性評估（協調標準覆蓋產品通常為內部生產控制），並出具歐盟符合性聲明。EN IEC 62619、EN IEC 63056及IEC 62933-5-2協調標準可推定符合低電壓指令基本安全要求。在匈牙利，MSZT以MSZ EN標準形式採用歐盟協調標準，市場監管由匈牙利貿易許可局（MKEH）及相關行業主管機構負責。

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the LVD CE-marking framework. Electrical safety for BESS in China is governed by GB 44240-2024 for compulsory cell/battery safety, GB/T 36276-2023 as a recommended cell/battery safety standard, GB/T 36558-2023 at system level, and sector-specific grid-connection technical specifications issued by State Grid Corporation and China Southern Power Grid. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to certain electrical products — as of mid-2026 stationary BESS systems have not been brought into CCC scope under any publicly confirmed CNCA announcement; verify with CNCA for any post-2025 changes. Safety certification is primarily managed through NEA project approval and grid-operator technical review.
summary.zh: 中国没有与低电压指令CE标志框架直接对应的制度。BESS电气安全由GB 44240-2024规范强制性电芯/电池安全要求，GB/T 36276-2023作为推荐性电芯/电池安全标准，GB/T 36558-2023规范系统层面要求，并由国家电网、南方电网发布的行业并网技术规范共同约束。CCC强制认证适用于部分电气产品——截至2026年中，固定式BESS系统尚未在任何经公开确认的CNCA公告中纳入CCC范围；如需确认2025年后是否有变化，请向CNCA核实。安全认证主要通过国家能源局项目核准及电网企业技术审查实施。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與低電壓指令CE標誌框架直接對應的制度。BESS電氣安全由GB 44240-2024規範強制性電芯/電池安全要求，GB/T 36276-2023作為推薦性電芯/電池安全標準，GB/T 36558-2023規範系統層面要求，並由國家電網、南方電網發布的行業並網技術規範共同約束。CCC強制認證適用於部分電氣產品——截至2026年中，固定式BESS系統尚未在任何經公開確認的CNCA公告中納入CCC範圍；如需確認2025年後是否有變化，請向CNCA核實。安全認證主要通過國家能源局項目核准及電網企業技術審查實施。

standards_or_laws: CCC (3C) certification scheme (stationary BESS has not been brought into CCC scope under any publicly confirmed CNCA announcement as of mid-2026 — verify with CNCA for any post-2025 changes)

gap.en: China's project-approval and grid-operator review model does not produce the product-level EU DoC and technical file required by LVD 2014/35/EU. Chinese exporters must appoint an EU Authorised Representative, compile an LVD-compliant technical file (risk assessment, test reports to harmonised standards, instructions), and self-declare or engage a notified body. No bilateral mutual recognition agreement (MRA) covers electrical safety between China and the EU for BESS products. In Hungary, the EU-language requirement means documentation must be available in Hungarian on request from MKEH or other market surveillance authorities.
gap.zh: 中国的项目核准和电网企业审查模式不产生低电压指令2014/35/EU所要求的产品级欧盟符合性声明及技术文件。中国出口商须在欧盟指定授权代表，编制符合低电压指令的技术文件（风险评估、协调标准测试报告、说明书），并进行自我声明或委托通知机构。中欧之间就BESS产品电气安全尚无双边互认协议。在匈牙利，欧盟语言要求意味着相关文件须能应MKEH或其他市场监管机构要求以匈牙利语提供。
gap.zht: 中國的項目核准和電網企業審查模式不產生低電壓指令2014/35/EU所要求的產品級歐盟符合性聲明及技術文件。中國出口商須在歐盟指定授權代表，編制符合低電壓指令的技術文件（風險評估、協調標準測試報告、說明書），並進行自我聲明或委託公告機構。中歐之間就BESS產品電氣安全尚無雙邊互認協議。在匈牙利，歐盟語言要求意味著相關文件須能應MKEH或其他市場監管機構要求以匈牙利語提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LVD 2014/35/EU is a binding EU directive; CE marking is a legal prerequisite for EU/Hungary market access
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory CE/LVD framework; safety governed through project-approval and grid-operator review processes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese safety approvals (NEA project approval, grid-operator certificates, GB 36276 test reports) do not constitute LVD compliance. EU/Hungary market access requires a product-level EU Declaration of Conformity, an LVD-compliant technical file, CE marking, and an appointed EU Authorised Representative. Hungarian-language user instructions and documentation may be required by MKEH on market surveillance request.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国安全批准文件（国家能源局项目核准、电网企业证书、GB 36276测试报告）不构成低电压指令合规。进入欧盟/匈牙利市场须具备产品级欧盟符合性声明、符合低电压指令的技术文件、CE标志，并指定欧盟授权代表。匈牙利贸易许可局（MKEH）在市场监管检查时可能要求提供匈牙利语用户说明书及文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國安全批准文件（國家能源局項目核准、電網企業證書、GB 36276測試報告）不構成低電壓指令合規。進入歐盟/匈牙利市場須具備產品級歐盟符合性聲明、符合低電壓指令的技術文件、CE標誌，並指定歐盟授權代表。匈牙利貿易許可局（MKEH）在市場監管檢查時可能要求提供匈牙利語用戶說明書及文件。
